parameters.text:
🎮 OdiePt ODIE aktif. Karakter kartini acmak icin asagidaki butona bas — Telegram icinde tam ekran olarak calisir.

Antrenman eklemek icin bana yaz:
`bench 62.5 3x5, 70dk push`

ODIE her antrenmanda XP, streak ve stat hesaplar.

additionalFields.reply_markup: ={{ JSON.stringify({ inline_keyboard: [[{ text: '⚔️ Karakter Kartini Ac', web_app: { url: 'https://odie-pt.vercel.app' } }]] }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { responseMimeType: 'application/json', temperature: 0.3 } }) }}

parameters.text:
={{ '✅ Kaydedildi!

' + ($json.coach_reply || '') + '

⚡ +' + $json.xpEarned + ' XP' + ($json.xpMultiplier > 1 ? ' (x' + $json.xpMultiplier + ')' : '') + '
🔥 Streak: ' + $json.newStreak + ' gun' + ($json.streakLabel ? ' — ' + $json.streakLabel : '') + '
🛡️ Armor: ' + $json.armor + '/100  |  🧠 Fatigue: ' + $json.fatigue + '/100' }}

additionalFields.reply_markup: ={{ JSON.stringify({ inline_keyboard: [[{ text: '⚔️ Karti Ac', web_app: { url: 'https://odie-pt.vercel.app' } }]] }) }}
